items.valueAdd: Subdivision zoning (R30/R40/R60) · 772sqm — SUBDIVIDE: retain/demolish house, build 2 homes on split lots
items.reason: SUBDIVISION PLAY — 772sqm R30/R40/R60 zoned. Subdivision zoning — this is the #1 value play in Perth mid-ring. 772sqm block = granny flat income or future subdivision. ACTION: Call agent, request contract for solicitor review, book building & pest inspection ($400-600), check council flood/bushfire overlays.

items.reason: STANDARD. At top of budget range. Gawler East is premium — good schools, electrified train. No urgency signals. Monitor for price settling toward $799k.

items.addr: 9 Lisa Martin Court, Gawler East, SA 5118
items.valueAdd: 900sqm — granny flat potential ($120-180k build, +$350-450pw rent) · Possible subdivision if zoned R20+
items.reason: LARGE BLOCK. 900sqm in Gawler East — room for granny flat or potential subdivision. Electrified train, 43k new homes planned nearby. If price settles at $775k, stamp ~$31k + costs = ~$108k total. ACTION: Check zoning via SA Planning Portal, call agent for contract.
STANDARD. Paralowie is safer than Salisbury Downs (lower crime) but still northern Adelaide. "From" pricing suggests negotiation room. Monitor — better SA options in Gawler.

discarded.note: Limited SA data — Domain/REA/Harris block automated access. These listings from Google search results.

Gawler (SA).source: Allhomes/Google search — SA portals block automated access

items.reason: VIC CONSIDERATION. Very affordable entry at $450k (VIC stamp ~$17k, total ~$65k). BUT Melbourne growing only 5-7% vs WA 10-15%. VIC stamp duty surcharge for investors adds ~1.5%. Growth ceiling significantly lower than WA/SA alternatives. Include only if you want geographic diversification regardless of return trade-off.
VIC CONSIDERATION. 4-bed at $579k in VIC is cheap. Same caveat: Melbourne underperforming, stamp duty surcharge hurts. Only if portfolio needs VIC exposure.
